About

The journey of one thousand apps starts with a single key press...

My name is Chris. I’m a student iOS developer in the New York Area. I like international politics, history, dogs, hiking and more. This is a space for me to write about my adventures as a developer. Please send me a meesage if you have any questions.

Some fun facts:

  • Student iOS Developer
  • Located in New York Metro Area
  • Dogs!
  • Enjoys Hiking, Politics and History

Have questions or suggestions? Feel free to contact me on GitHub or ask me on Twitter.

Thanks for reading!
